stemHtml:
In this exchange between F-GTPO and Lille Tower, which elements were correctly read back?

"F-PO, squawk 6101" / "6101, F-PO" / "F-PO, radar identified, cleared to Lille via route SA then leave via route N" / "Cleared to Lille via SA then leave via N, F-PO"

1. Squawk readback
2. Squawk not read back
3. Route readback
4. Route not read back
